rankings.title: Baseten CEO Tuhin Srivastava on Custom Models, and Building the Inference Cloud
summary_bullets: Inference cloud grew 30x in a year.
95% of tokens are from custom models.
Capacity crunch is worse than perceived.
Software layer makes inference sticky.

rankings.title: Really Big Test-Time Compute in AI Changes Benchmarks, Safety and Research with OpenAI's Noam Brown
summary_bullets: Test-time compute scaling changes model evaluation.
Benchmarks don’t account for compute budget.
Models improve with weeks of thinking.
Safety policies ignore inference budget.
Advocate plotting performance vs. compute.

rankings.title: SAP: Bringing the ‘Operating System’ of a Company into the AI Era with CTO Philipp Herzig
summary_bullets: SAP's AI strategy focuses on enterprise scale.
LLMs insufficient for predictive analytics; need RPT1.
AI adoption faces data integration and security challenges.
SAP moving from seat-based to consumption pricing.
Agentic coding requires writing evals, not just code.

rankings.title: Building an AI Guardian for Enterprise with Onyx Security CEO Maxim Bar Kogan
summary_bullets: AI agents cause unintended actions in enterprises.
Onyx trains small models to oversee agents.
Enterprises rapidly adopt autonomous coding agents.
Existing security tools lack agent-intent context.
Israeli ecosystem combines cyber and AI talent.

rankings.title: Re-engineering the Semiconductor Supply Chain with Intel CEO Lip Bu Tan
summary_bullets: Intel CEO Lip Bu Tan discusses turnaround plan.
US government becomes major shareholder in Intel.
AI demand boosts CPU importance, not just GPU.
Foundry business requires trust, yield, and IP.
Venture investing focuses on bottlenecks and applications.

other.title: Pax Silica: Inside the Trump Administration’s Tech Strategy with Jacob Helberg
summary_bullets: Pax Silica coalition secures AI supply chain with allies.
Philippines grants 4,000 acres for industrial base.
Contrasts with China’s Belt and Road debt-trap model.
Focus on private-sector-led, commercially viable platforms.
Covers rare earths, robotics, and semiconductor supply chains.

other.title: The Story Behind Cerebras’ $63 Billion IPO with Founder and CEO Andrew Feldman
summary_bullets: Cerebras CEO on $63B IPO journey
Wafer-scale chips 15-20x faster than GPUs
Speed matters only when AI is widely used
Persevered through years of market indifference
Signed $20B+ deal with OpenAI in 2025

other.title: How AI Agents Will Transform the Financial System with Circle Co-Founder and CEO Jeremy Allaire
summary_bullets: Stablecoins as full-reserve digital dollars backed by Treasuries.
Circle’s ARC blockchain designed for real economy and AI agents.
Transaction costs now sub-cent, enabling micro-payments for AI.
Tokenization of stocks and treasuries is already happening.
AI diffusion will force new social and economic contracts.

other.title: We Need An Ecosystem in AI, And Every Company Can Win A Place In It
summary_bullets: AI ecosystem enables every company to participate.
Private evals and harnesses are key IP.
Shift from per-user to consumption pricing.
Need tangible community benefits for AI.
Agentic systems reconceptualize work.

other.title: Scaling Global Organizations in the Age of AI with ServiceNow Chairman and CEO Bill McDermott
summary_bullets: Bill McDermott bought a deli at 16.
ServiceNow is an AI control tower for enterprises.
Enterprise platforms are 10x cheaper than replicating with LLMs.
AI agents will reduce headcount growth.
Software must be deterministic; humans forgive mistakes, software not.

other.title: AI for Atoms: How Periodic Labs is Revolutionizing Materials Engineering with Co-Founder Liam Fedus
summary_bullets: Liam Fedus co-created ChatGPT, now building Periodic Labs.
Periodic Labs applies AI to materials science and chemistry.
AI systems need closed-loop experiments for physical world.

other.title: “Curing All Disease by next century is too conservative" - Mark Zuckerberg
summary_bullets: Biohub uses AI to accelerate biology research.
Open-source protein folding model ESM Fold released.

Treat individuals by understanding genetics and mechanisms.
AI aims to turn biology into engineering science.

other.title: Amex Global Business Travel: The World’s First AI Take Private with Long Lake CEO Alexander Taubman
summary_bullets: Long Lake acquires Amex GBT for $6.3B.
